dialog.title: Support Project
dialog.description: Thank you for using the website! This is a completely free personally maintained project. If you find it helpful, please consider supporting the project to help maintain and improve the website.
dialog.supportMessage: Your support is the driving force for continuous project improvement

pattern.title: Generation Settings

input.label: Input custom uppercase letters you want to generate, e.g.: QUBIC
input.placeholder: Enter address prefix or suffix to generate

cpuUsage.label: Performance
cpuUsage.tooltip: Adjust performance to balance generation speed and system response

forceStart.label: Force Start
forceStart.tooltip: Force start mode will ignore network connection status but may have security risks

pattern.offlineNotice: Offline generation only ensures generation process security, please keep your seed safe
pattern.networkAlert: For security reasons, it's recommended to use this tool offline

info.title: Generation Information
info.recommendedLength: Recommended letter count should not exceed 5, generation time increases exponentially with difficulty

result.title: Generation Result
result.warning: Disclaimer: This tool is for learning and entertainment purposes only, please do not store large assets! For generation security, please check the project code yourself.
result.warningClipboard: The seed information will not be saved. To prevent the seed from leaking through the clipboard, please promptly scan the QR code with the official Qubic mobile wallet for import.

mobile.description: The seed information will not be saved. Please promptly scan the QR code with the official Qubic mobile wallet for import.

addressList.label: Address List (One per line)
addressList.placeholder: Enter addresses to query, one per line

noProposal.title: No Proposals
noProposal.description: There are currently no proposals to vote on

calculator.title: Profit Calculator

hashRate.tooltip: Calculated based on the average Hashrate of each mining pool to statistics, and there may be some efficiency differences between CPU Hashrate and GPU Ha sh ra te.

luck.tooltip: Performance efficiency refers to the ratio of the number of solutions you have produced from the start of the current mining pool epoch to the expected number of solutions.

expectedCurrentCoins.tooltip: The expected coins are calculated based on statistical data and mining pool fees, but do not represent final earnings; the operation status of the mining pool may also affect earnings.

expectedCurrentBlocks.tooltip: The expected current solutions count refers to the number of solutions you are expected to mine from the start of the epoch until now in your current mining pool epoch.

profitAnalysis.tooltip: Profit analysis is only a preliminary estimate affected by various data factors. Please take the actual profit as the standard.

calculator.tip: For data accuracy, please query during non-idle time

title.tooltip: Here is a list of available mining pools, you can choose one to join mining.

qli.name: QLI Pool
qli.description: In the Qubic ecosystem, QLI Pool is currently the largest mining pool with the most users. It offers various income distribution methods and supports multiple mining modes; you can easily find answers to all kinds of questions. This pool is compatible with operating systems such as LINUX, WIN (Windows), and HIVEOS.

apool.name: Apool
apool.description: Apool.io is a technology platform focusing on blockchain mining services, committed to providing users with efficient, safe, and stable pool solutions. Currently, the platform supports various cryptocurrency mining, including QUBIC, ALEO, etc., helping users maximize their Hashrate utilization and optimize earnings. Since its launch, Apool.io has been renowned for its stability, offering sustained and substantial income guarantees to users, as well as 24/7 technical support services, quickly responding to user needs and resolving issues encountered during the mining process.

solutions.name: Solutions
solutions.description: Whether you are a mining novice or have some experience, Solutions Pool can meet your needs. Solutions Pool provides PPLNS (pay per last N shares) and solo mining options suitable for CPU, GPU, and Android devices.

minerlab.name: MinerLab
minerlab.description: Qubic Lab, managed by MinerLab.io, is a mining pool tailored for the Qubic blockchain, supporting both CPU and GPU mining. It offers high yields for mining operations and is designed to be compatible with various hardware configurations. The platform emphasizes scalability, efficiency, and community-driven innovation, simplifying blockchain accessibility while ensuring robust performance for miners and developers alike.

networkStatus.offline: Network disconnected, please use incognito mode
networkStatus.online: Please disconnect network and use incognito mode
